summary: Tested AI-driven PosizionamentoPage and MasterclassPage. Backend endpoints working (15/19 tests passed). AI generation endpoints failing due to Anthropic API authentication error. Frontend pages rendering correctly with proper hero sections, 7 input fields, and admin panoramic view.

critical.issue: Returns 500 - Anthropic API authentication error: 'invalid x-api-key'. The code uses .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') which requires valid Anthropic API key
Returns 500 - Same Anthropic API authentication error. The masterclass_factory.py line 236 uses .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929')

minor.issue: Returns 400 when no positioning_output exists - expected behavior but test failed because generate-positioning failed first

integration_issues.issue: GENERA POSIZIONAMENTO and GENERA SCRIPT buttons will fail due to backend API authentication error

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Anthropic API authentication - The code uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat with .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') but the API key is invalid
Option 1: Remove .with_model() call to use default model (partner_journey.py doesn't use it and works)
Option 2: Configure valid Anthropic API key in environment
Option 3: Use EMERGENT_LLM_KEY without specifying anthropic model explicitly
critical_code_review_comments: masterclass_factory.py line 236: .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') requires valid Anthropic API key
partner_journey.py uses LlmChat without .with_model() - this pattern should be used for consistency
Both pages correctly implement the AI-driven flow: Input → Generation → Output → Validation

success_rate.backend: 79% (15/19 tests passed - 4 failed due to Anthropic API auth error)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI rendering correctly, hero sections, input fields, admin view all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI generation endpoints failing due to Anthropic API authentication. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is configured but the code explicitly calls .with_model('anthropic', ...) which requires direct Anthropic API access. Frontend pages render correctly - PosizionamentoPage shows 7 input fields with correct labels, MasterclassPage shows 7 input fields. Admin panoramic view works correctly showing all inputs in read-only mode.

features_tested.Backend: POST /api/partner-journey/posiz: FAIL - No positioning to approve (depends on generate)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The masterclass_factory.py uses .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') which bypasses the Emergent LLM integration and tries to call Anthropic API directly. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not a valid Anthropic API key.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove .with_model() call from masterclass_factory.py line 236 to use default Emergent LLM model, similar to how partner_journey.py works
